title: Hiring expert to create boards and improve workflow
excerpt: Hi, I run an estate agency in the UK and I would like help to create a board to track commissions, and also for someone to potentially help us improve our existing boards and workflow on Monday. Thank you!

posts.author: BillyS (Billy Sio)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I run an estate agency in the UK and I would like help to create a board to track commissions, and also for someone to potentially help us improve our existing boards and workflow on Monday. Thank you!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @BillyS and welcome to the monday.com community forums! I saw that you scheduled some time with me already for this week but I wanted to be sure you knew there were a lot of great partners here within the community.

Feel free to learn a bit more about us here: CarbonWeb

Looking forward to connecting with you!

Best regards,

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BillyS

Welcome to the monday.com community!

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. We have several real estate based clients and plenty of experience in commissions solutions as well as detailed project management requirements so I’m confident we can help.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and see how we can help.

Meet with Peta

Peta - upstream

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @BillyS !
